description:
Implement a Ctrl+K fuzzy-search palette for navigating pages and triggering commands like creating items, filtering lists, or jumping to boards.

**Rationale:** Power users and keyboard-centric workflows demand speed. A command palette drastically reduces mouse dependency and navigation friction.
title: Command Palette / Quick Actions
